description: Earnings quality scanner via Sloan accruals + Beneish proxies. 4-factor: accruals %assets, OCF/NI cash conv, DSRI+GMI, YoY accrual change. Top 20 LONG / bottom 10 AVOID. $2B+ mcap gate. Sloan 1996 (+10%/yr), Beneish 1999. Weekly Wed 13:30 UTC.
